name: XMAX Starry 4 Screen Pack
summary: XMAX Starry 4 Screen Pack — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Keep devices performing at their best with the XMax Starry 4 Screen Pack —a complete maintenance accessory set for the XMax Starry 4 (Starry V4) vaporiser. Designed for routine upkeep, this pack helps maintain clean airflow, reliable sealing, and consistent vapour quality. This all-in-one set includes essential replacement components for regular servicing. With multiple screens, O-rings, and a removal tool, it provides everything needed to keep the device in optimal condition. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
